title: Grab rolls out AI companion services to boost earnings
desc: Grab is accelerating its shift beyond transaction-based services to become an "intelligent everyday guide", evolving from a super-app into a more integrated, AI-driven companion.

title: Long break eases pressure on oil reserves
desc: The long holiday during the Songkran festival may ease pressure on Thailand's oil reserves, as demand for diesel is expected to decrease during this period, says the Department of Energy Business.

title: Airlines adjust operations amid ceasefire
desc: Despite a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, Thai airlines still have to adjust their operational strategies for the summer schedule to match travel demand dampened by concerns over uncertainty surrounding the oil crisis.

title: New state measures in bid to solve plastic crisis
desc: The government has outlined management guidelines to tackle the ongoing plastic pellet crisis. Key initiatives will focus on identifying high-priority items, promoting the use of alternative materials, and enhancing recycling.

title: New regulations support transition and amber bonds
desc: Thailand's Capital Market Supervisory Board has approved new regulatory frameworks to support the issuance of Transition Bonds and Thailand Amber Bonds, alongside plans to introduce Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) by the third quarter of this year.

title: Thailand seen highly exposed to oil shock
desc: Thailand is among the region's most vulnerable countries to an oil shock, with the risk potentially reducing household income by 3-4%, according to the World Bank.

title: 2m tonnes of chemical fertiliser eyed from Russia
desc: Agriculture and Cooperatives Minister Suriya Juangroongruangkit has unveiled plans to import up to two million tonnes of chemical fertiliser from Russia to address a looming supply shortage affecting Thailand's farming sector.

title: EC vows fair probe into People's Party Spectre C case
desc: The Election Commission (EC) has insisted the People's Party (PP) will receive a fair and impartial investigation over allegations linking it to media-related firm Spectre C, which could lead to the party's dissolution.

title: Flights up, passengers down over break
desc: Suvarnabhumi airport anticipates handling 1.82 million passengers over the 10-day Songkran holiday period (April 10–19), averaging about 182,000 travellers per day, says director Kittipong Kittikachorn.

title: 'Fuel money' cop faces action
desc: Four alleged victims have been identified in a probe into a police investigator accused of demanding "fuel money", with disciplinary and criminal action under way.

title: Oil hoarding suspected in 4 provinces
desc: Suspected oil hoarding has been uncovered in four provinces, prompting a multi-agency crackdown and a push to classify the cases as special investigations.

title: Co-payment scheme to expand in May
desc: The Finance Ministry has confirmed the next phase of the "Khon La Khrueng" co-payment scheme will start in May, with an expanded reach aimed at easing the financial strain on households amid ongoing economic pressures.

title: PM calls for respect for elderly, stronger family ties
desc: Simple gestures such as bowing, paying respect and embracing loved ones can strengthen family bonds, Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said yesterday as he opened a National Elderly Day event.

title: State bus operator freezes fares, deploys 7,700 buses for Songkran
desc: State-run Transport Co Ltd has pledged to keep fares unchanged through April 19 and deploy more than 7,700 buses to handle the annual Songkran travel rush, assuring passengers there will be no one left stranded.

title: Three Thai crew confirmed dead
desc: Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow on Wednesday confirmed the deaths of three Thai crew members who went missing following an attack on the vessel MV Mayuree Naree in the Strait of Hormuz last month amid the Middle East conflict.

title: Diesel prices to drop 2.14 baht a litre nationwide
desc: Thailand will slash pump prices for diesel by 2.14 baht a litre from Thursday, offering motorists and businesses immediate relief after the government approved an overhaul of refinery pricing to ease household costs and shore up the heavily...

title: Tanker held up in Middle East arrives in Chon Buri
desc: CHON BURI - An oil tanker that was earlier stranded in the Strait of Hormuz has successfully completed its journey to Chon Buri, delivering its cargo of crude oil to Bangchak Corporation.

title: 'Sawadeekowloon': Mural celebrates Thai culture in Hong Kong under renovation scheme
desc: HONG KONG — Seven murals celebrating the Thai and Chiu Chow heritage of Hong Kong's Kowloon City will be erected in the district known for its ethnic Thai population and traditional stores under a public scheme to encourage building renovations in the area.

title: The most expensive cup of tea in Bangkok
desc: Bangkok has always been a city where the same ingredient can cost you fifty baht or five hundred depending on which door you walk through, but matcha has taken this further than most. At one end of the spectrum you have green powder being ladled into plastic cups at stalls across Chatuchak and On Nut. At the other, you have a single cup at Deep Tea in Ladprao running 3,900 baht, and the place...

title: 最近这个OOTD，为什么让泰国人集体“沦陷”？
desc: 最近，在曼谷的街头巷尾与全球社交媒体上，一种极具视觉张力的混搭风潮席卷而来：上半身泰式披肩（Sabai），下半身牛仔裤。这标示着由Z世代主导、由KT Kratae等艺人引领的泰国传统文化符号日常化演变。

title: Thailand diesel price drops 2.14 baht from April 9
desc: Thailand will cut diesel price by 2.14 baht per litre from tomorrow, April 9, marking a historic first-time reduction in fuel prices. Energy Minister Akanat Promphan confirmed the reduction for B7 and B20 diesel.

title: 泰国宋干节去是隆路前，你一定要知道这些！
desc: 曼谷的四月，有很多热闹。  但真正能让你一脚踏进去，就立刻感受到“泰国新年到了”的地方， 只有一个—— 是隆路（Silom Road） 当整条路正式封街， 音响开到最大， 陌生人朝你举起水枪， 第一瓢冰水从头顶浇下来的那一刻—— 你会瞬间明白， 宋干节不是“看活动”，而是“你必须亲自站进去一次”。 而2026年，最值得冲的，还是它。 “Songkran Silom Splash Out With Thai Culture 2026” 4月12日—14日，连续3天，正式回归。 这不是普通泼水。 这是每年只上演一次的 曼谷最疯、最挤、最好玩、也最值得和朋友一起去的宋干主战场。 为什么今年的是隆路，特别值得去？ 因为它不只是“疯”，  而是第一次把 泰国文化感 和 年轻人的狂欢感 真正混在了一起。 往年大家对是隆路的印象，都是： 人多、水猛、音乐炸、气氛疯。 但今年，它明显不一样了。  官方不只想让你“玩湿”，  更想让你感受到—— 泰国的宋干节，为什么能让全世界的人都愿意飞来参加。 1）不是单纯泼水，而是“有仪式感的新年” 4月12日将有浴佛祈福仪式与佛像花车活动。也就是说，你来到这里，不只是来玩，也是在走进一个真正属于泰国的新年现场。 2）今年最出圈的穿搭，真的会在这里刷屏 今年官方特别鼓励大家穿上： 泰式披肩（Sabai）+ 牛仔裤 泰式花衬

title: Bangchak oil tanker reaches Thailand after Hormuz passage
desc: Bangchak oil tanker reaches Thailand after Hormuz passage Legacy Bangchak said its oil tanker MT.POLA arrived safely in Thailand at Si Racha district, Chon Buri, today, April 8, after passing through the Strait of Hormuz and delivering crude oil to the company’s refinery. The voyage followed diplomatic coordination involving Thailand, Iran and Oman, which reportedly allowed Thai cargo vessels to use the route on March 23 to 24. The passage was made possible after coordination led by Sihasak Phuangketkeow, acting foreign minister at the time. He reportedly worked with the three governments to s

title: Former hospital worker arrested for embezzling 23 million baht
desc: Former hospital worker arrested for embezzling 23 million baht Legacy A former finance and accounting worker at a hospital in Uttaradit confessed to embezzling more than 23 million baht to support her gambling addiction . Officers from Mueang Uttaradit Police Station arrested 48 year old Or at a commercial building in the city centre on Monday, March 6. She previously worked at Udon Thani Cancer Hospital and had allegedly fled before her arrest. According to Hone Krasae, Or left Udon Thani and hid in Lamphun before later moving to Uttaradit. Police were able to locate her after an informant sp

title: Charging power bank blamed for Nakhon Ratchasima condo fire
desc: Charging power bank blamed for Nakhon Ratchasima condo fire Legacy A power bank explosion triggered a fire in a condominium in Mueang district, Nakhon Ratchasima, at about 1am today, April 8, prompting an emergency evacuation of residents . Police and rescue workers responded to reports of a fire at the building in Nai Mueang subdistrict. Firefighters and municipal teams were deployed to the sixth floor, where the blaze had broken out inside a room. Residents were evacuated via fire escape stairs as alarms were activated. The fire was brought under control in less than one hour, with no injuri

title: Saraburi father files complaint after tutor hits boy with phone
desc: Saraburi father files complaint after tutor hits boy with phone Legacy A father in Saraburi filed a police complaint yesterday, April 7, after alleging that a female tutor injured his seven year old son by hitting the boy on the head with a mobile phone, leaving him with a head injury . The boy was later taken to Saraburi Hospital, where he received treatment. The doctors said the boy’s wound did not require stitches and was a small open wound. The child’s father, 41 year old Pitak, said he had enrolled his son for tutoring during the school holiday near their home. He said the boy had attende

title: 避免直接接触！泰国普吉近海及岸边现月亮水母
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月7日，据泰媒报道，泰国上安达曼海岸与海洋资源研究中心表示，普吉府Racha Yai岛暹罗湾附近海面漂浮着约20至30只月亮水母，并有部分被冲上海岸。 研究中心称，在Racha Yai岛海洋保护区管理中心工作人员报告发现后，相关部门已发出提醒。随后，工作人员确认这些水母为月亮水母属于泰国海域常见物种。 月亮水母携带的毒性较弱，通常不构成生命危险，但可能引发皮肤发红、灼烧感与刺激反应，尤其是皮肤敏感或对蜇伤反应较强的人群更需注意。有关部门建议公众与游客不要直接触摸水母，也不必恐慌，因为该物种不属于高危险级别。若接触后出现异常症状，建议清洁患处，并作为预防措施及时就医。 上周泰国副总理兼自然资源与环境部长素查曾在普吉府Aeo岛周边发现高密度的有毒火水母后提醒公众注意安全，据悉，被火水母蜇后可能出现刺痛、灼痛、皮肤刺激或红疹。若遭蜇伤，建议持续用食醋冲洗患处至少30秒，并尽快就医。素查表示，海洋与沿海资源厅（DMCR）报告称，当地水母密度约为每平方米100只，水母漂浮在距海面约3至5米深度水层。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；来源：thethaiger） The post 避免直接接触！泰国普吉近海及岸边现月亮水母 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Samut Songkhram officials launch crackdown on fake coconut water
desc: Samut Songkhram officials launch crackdown on fake coconut water Legacy Police raided two production facilities in Samut Songkhram yesterday, April 7, over fake coconut water made from water and flavourings, which officers say was harming local farmers, consumers and the reputation of Thai coconut products. Local coconut farmers sought government action after coconut prices fell and exports to China, one of the sector’s biggest markets, declined. They said the problems were linked to Chinese nationals allegedly investing illegally in coconut plantations in Samut Sakhon, Samut Songkhram and Rat

title: 泰国电影导演协会奖揭晓 跨界新生代包揽最佳男女主
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰媒报道，近日，第15届泰国电影导演协会奖在曼谷Sukosol酒店举行颁奖典礼，向泰国电影行业多个奖项类别的优秀作品与从业者颁发荣誉。 其中，Jaonaay Jinjett凭借电影《疯狂的佛牌》中Ek一角获得最佳男主角奖。Fatima Dechawaleekul则凭借电影《隔楼女孩：我们之间的层距》中Ann一角获得最佳女主角奖，影片以戏剧与成长叙事呈现人物情感与成长。 此外，最佳影片奖授予电影《有用的鬼》，最佳影片亚军授予《疯狂的佛牌》。最佳导演奖由林金伟及其助理导演团队凭借《有用的鬼》获得。为表彰泰国电影创作团队，典礼还设置并颁发了其他多个奖项。 本届颁奖典礼由泰国电影导演协会主办，评选采用1人1票制，由全体导演协会会员投票决定。主办方表示，该奖项被视为推动泰国电影产业提升质量的重要平台之一。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；来源：TheStandardPOP）

title: Tourists warned after moon jellyfish found floating off Phuket
desc: Tourists warned after moon jellyfish found floating off Phuket Legacy About 20 to 30 moon jellyfish were found floating near the surface and washed ashore at Ao Siam on Koh Racha Yai in Phuket yesterday, April 7, according to the Upper Andaman Coastal and Marine Resources Research Centre. An alert was issued after staff at the Racha Islands protected area management centre in Rawai, Mueang district, Phuket, reported the sighting. Officials later identified the animals as moon jellyfish , a species commonly found in Thai waters.

title: Thailand’s most wanted drug suspect arrested in South Korea after attempted fake death
desc: One of Thailand's most wanted drug suspects was extradited from South Korea yesterday, April 7, after spending more than 14 years hiding overseas and attempting to fake his own death to avoid arrest . The suspect, 43 year old Thapanan, also known as Noo Chan, arrived at Suvarnabhumi International Airport yesterday after his arrest in South Korea .

title: US military aircraft presence at Krabi Airport raises questions
desc: Residents in Krabi have raised questions after multiple United States military aircraft were seen operating at Krabi International Airport yesterday, April 7, with frequent take-offs and landings reported throughout the day and night.

title: 2 foreign men intervene alleged harassment on Bangkok footpath
desc: Two foreign men were praised by Thai social media users after stepping in to help a woman from harassment on a footpath in Sathorn, Bangkok, yesterday, April 7.

title: KKP sees housing prices rising 10% amid oil crisis
desc: Kiatnakin Phatra Financial Group (KKP) forecasts that a surge in global oil prices will push housing prices up by 10% this year, primarily affecting homebuyers in the mass-market segment.

title: 缅甸突破电诈团伙密林据点 抓获超百名中籍人员
desc: 据泰媒报道，4月7日13时左右，缅甸方面对一处网络诈骗及线上赌博的团伙基地展开清剿行动。该地点位于Ban Pang Ku村附近的密林区域，距离Tachileik市区及泰国清莱府Mae Sai边境约13公里。本次行动共抓获中国籍人员125人。

title: 泰国国家旅游局公布曼谷宋干节两大主活动场地
desc: 4月7日，泰国国家旅游局准备进一步强化宋干节“世界级节庆”的形象，将举办两项重点活动：2026宋干世界泼水节和2026宋干魅力艺术节。预计宋干节期间全国旅游总收入将超过303.5亿泰铢。

title: 曼谷掀起健身操热，3000人共舞挤爆广场
desc: 4月7日17点30分，泰国曼谷Lumphini公园休闲活动广场人气爆棚，舞蹈达人Dada带领健康爱好者一起跳操，点燃现场气氛。曼谷市长查察到场并表示希望将此类活动推广到更多地方。

title: 泰军揭露边境电诈基地，手术室、牢房、赌场全都有
desc: 4月7日，泰柬联合新闻中心负责人带领媒体记者实地考察位于泰柬边境的电诈基地。该基地内部设施完善，包含诈骗办公区、处罚未达标人员的地下牢房，甚至还设有设备齐全的手术室和医院。

title: 泰国总理换座驾、BYD登顶曼谷车展，中国新能源车在泰国的历史性崛起
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年2月28日，美以联军对伊朗发动空袭，中东局势骤然恶化。国际原油期货价格随即突破每桶100美元，为三年多来首次，此后纽约与伦敦布伦特原油期货一度逼近每桶120美元，约30%的盘中涨幅创下近40年来纪录。 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队放话，绝不允许一升石油在有利于美国及其盟友的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡。联合国贸易和发展会议最新报告显示，自2月28日战争爆发以来，霍尔木兹海峡的船舶通航数量已骤降97%。 作为高度依赖进口原油的东南亚国家，泰国几乎在第一时间感受到了这场冲击。国际油价突破每桶110美元，仅3月一个月，泰国柴油价格就上涨约30%。油气价格大涨、企业运营成本增加、民众支出能力被显著压缩。 3月25日，泰国总理阿努廷乘坐深灰色中国新能源车BYD轻装出行，仅配备一名司机和两名随行人员，取消开道警车及车队，本人坐在副驾驶位，与往年乘坐劳斯莱斯车队的排场形成鲜明对比。 泰国官方于3月25日宣布汽油每公升加价6泰铢后，总理阿努廷翌日便一改常态，舍弃平时乘坐的劳斯莱斯，改为乘坐比亚迪前往国会大厦开会，并公开呼吁民众多尝试电动车，以减低燃料开支并实现零排放。 这不只是个人出行习惯的改变。阿努廷公开表示，电动车可显著降低通勤成本且实现零排放，呼吁民众转向新能源交通工具。 此前，他还曾在公开行程中乘坐极氪出行，以身作则的姿态引发广泛媒体关注，成为本轮能源危机下泰国政界最具标志性的

title: Le Café Louis Vuitton launches its  new savoury offerings for summer
desc: Le Café Louis Vuitton at LV The Place Bangkok welcomes summer with the launch of its first savoury offerings, alongside a new seasonal dessert menu, available from April through June.

title: The immortal Nanno
desc: After becoming a national phenomenon, Girl From Nowhere returns in a bold new form with Girl From Nowhere: The Reset. This reimagined version introduces Rebecca Patricia Armstrong -- professionally known as Becky Armstrong -- as a new incarnation of "Nanno", the enigmatic student who moves from school to school, exposing uncomfortable truths beneath the surface of society.

title: Ponder pairing and parting at  'Bitte(r)sweet' in Atta Gallery
desc: Art lovers are invited to ponder on the nature of love and sweetness during "Bitte(r)sweet", which is running at Atta Gallery, until May 31.

title: Global diversity on show for 'Vision' at Siam Paragon
desc: Explore the distinct viewpoints of international artists from different cultural backgrounds during "Vision", which is running at Art Jewel, 5th floor of Siam Paragon, Rama I Road, until April 28.
